name: implementation-plan
description: Standalone HTML implementation plan: goal, architecture summary, phased timeline with tasks, acceptance criteria, and validation evidence.

slots.description: Plan title; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label above the title.
One-sentence framing of what the plan delivers.
Plan status pill; element class selects the variant.
Extra header pills: owner, target date, branch.
Concrete outcome the plan produces, plus optional non-goals.
Architecture summary: surfaces touched, new modules, key contract changes.
Criteria list; each item gets class 'met' when satisfied.
Key/value rows of evidence: typecheck, tests, manual QA, observability.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.phase[]: { when: string, name: string, description: string, tasks: [{ text: string, done: boolean }], tags: string[] }
